overview.summary: Model score 8 vs user score 4 (gap 4). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech, Task-Environment Mismatch, Location Stability. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Model relied more heavily on objective sensor stability, while user-reported distraction tolerance was lower than inferred.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals alignment was acceptable, but confidence should be capped when biometric coverage is sparse.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion settling was detected correctly; avoid over-crediting stillness when other distraction signals are strong.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: Use GPS consistency to support motion interpretation while preserving audio-first weighting for environmental factors.

judgment_policy_next_run: Increase audio penalty when speech and moderate-to-high ambient noise co-occur.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
